    /// List all pets
    /// </summary>

    /// <param name="cancellationToken">A cancellation token.</param>

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public ValueTask DisposeAsync() => default;

    private async ValueTask<TResponse> SendAsyncCore<TRequest, TResponse>(
        JsonWorkspace workspace,
        TRequest request,
        ValidationMode responseValidationMode,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        where TRequest : struct, IApiRequest<TRequest>
        where TResponse : struct, IApiResponse<TResponse>
    {
        try
        {
            TResponse response = await this.transport.SendAsync<TRequest, TResponse>(in request, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);
            response.Validate(responseValidationMode);
            return response;
        }
        finally
        {
            workspace.Dispose();
        }
    }

    private async ValueTask<TResponse> SendWithBodyAsyncCore<TRequest, TBody, TResponse>(
        JsonWorkspace workspace,
        TRequest request,
        TBody body,
        ValidationMode responseValidationMode,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        where TRequest : struct, IApiRequest<TRequest>
        where TBody : struct, IJsonElement<TBody>
        where TResponse : struct, IApiResponse<TResponse>
    {
        try
        {
            TResponse response = await this.transport.SendAsync<TRequest, TBody, TResponse>(in request, in body, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);
            response.Validate(responseValidationMode);
            return response;
        }
        finally
        {
            workspace.Dispose();
        }
    }

    private async ValueTask<TResponse> SendWithBodyWriterAsyncCore<TRequest, TResponse>(
        JsonWorkspace workspace,
        TRequest request,
        Func<Stream, CancellationToken, ValueTask> bodyWriter,
        string contentType,
        ValidationMode responseValidationMode,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        where TRequest : struct, IApiRequest<TRequest>
        where TResponse : struct, IApiResponse<TResponse>
    {
        try
        {
            TResponse response = await this.transport.SendAsync<TRequest, TResponse>(in request, bodyWriter, contentType, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);
            response.Validate(responseValidationMode);
            return response;
        }
        finally
        {
            workspace.Dispose();
        }
    }

/// <summary>
/// Response type for the CreatePet operation.
/// </summary>
public struct CreatePetResponse : IApiResponse<CreatePetResponse>
{
    private IAsyncDisposable? owner;
    private IDisposable? parsedDocument;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public int StatusCode { get; private set; }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public bool IsSuccess => this.StatusCode >= 200 && this.StatusCode < 300;

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the 201 response body.
    /// </summary>
    public Petstore.Client.Pet CreatedBody { get; private set; }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the default response body.
    /// </summary>
    public Petstore.Client.Error DefaultBody { get; private set; }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static async ValueTask<CreatePetResponse> CreateAsync(
        int statusCode,
        Stream contentStream,
        string? contentType = null,
        IResponseHeaders? responseHeaders = null,
        IAsyncDisposable? owner = null,
        IApiTransport? transport = null,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        CreatePetResponse response = default;
        response.StatusCode = statusCode;
        response.owner = owner;

        if (statusCode == 201)
        {
            var createdDoc = await ParsedJsonDocument<Petstore.Client.Pet>.ParseAsync(contentStream, default, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);
            response.parsedDocument = createdDoc;
            response.CreatedBody = createdDoc.RootElement;
            return response;
        }

        var defaultDoc = await ParsedJsonDocument<Petstore.Client.Error>.ParseAsync(contentStream, default, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);
        response.parsedDocument = defaultDoc;
        response.DefaultBody = defaultDoc.RootElement;
        return response;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Tries to get the 201 typed response body.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="result">The typed response body if the status matches.</param>
    /// <returns><see langword="true"/> if the status code is 201.</returns>
    public bool TryGetCreated(out Petstore.Client.Pet result)
    {
        if (this.StatusCode == 201)
        {
            result = this.CreatedBody;
            return true;
        }

        result = default;
        return false;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Tries to get the default typed response body.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="result">The typed response body if the status matches.</param>
    /// <returns><see langword="true"/> if the status code does not match any specific response.</returns>
    public bool TryGetDefault(out Petstore.Client.Error result)
    {
        if (this.StatusCode != 201)
        {
            result = this.DefaultBody;
            return true;
        }

        result = default;
        return false;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Matches the response against each status code and content type,
    /// and calls the corresponding handler.
    /// </summary>
    /// <typeparam name="TResult">The type of the result returned by the handler.</typeparam>
    /// <param name="matchCreated">Handler for the 201 response.</param>
    /// <param name="matchDefault">Handler for a default response.</param>
    /// <returns>The result of calling the matched handler.</returns>
    public TResult MatchResult<TResult>(
        ResponseMatcher<Petstore.Client.Pet, TResult> matchCreated,
        ResponseMatcher<Petstore.Client.Error, TResult> matchDefault)
    {
        if (this.StatusCode == 201)
        {
            return matchCreated(this.CreatedBody);
        }

        return matchDefault(this.DefaultBody);
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Matches the response against each status code and content type,
    /// and calls the corresponding handler.
    /// </summary>
    /// <typeparam name="TContext">The type of the context to pass to the handler.</typeparam>
    /// <typeparam name="TResult">The type of the result returned by the handler.</typeparam>
    /// <param name="context">The context to pass to the handler.</param>
    /// <param name="matchCreated">Handler for the 201 response.</param>
    /// <param name="matchDefault">Handler for a default response.</param>
    /// <returns>The result of calling the matched handler.</returns>
    public TResult MatchResult<TContext, TResult>(
        in TContext context,
        ResponseMatcher<Petstore.Client.Pet, TContext, TResult> matchCreated,
        ResponseMatcher<Petstore.Client.Error, TContext, TResult> matchDefault)
    where TContext : allows ref struct
    {
        if (this.StatusCode == 201)
        {
            return matchCreated(this.CreatedBody, context);
        }

        return matchDefault(this.DefaultBody, context);
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void Validate(ValidationMode mode = ValidationMode.Basic)
    {
        if (mode == ValidationMode.None)
        {
            return;
        }
        else if (mode == ValidationMode.Detailed)
        {
            if (this.StatusCode == 201)
            {
                using JsonSchemaResultsCollector collector = JsonSchemaResultsCollector.Create(JsonSchemaResultsLevel.Detailed);
                if (!this.CreatedBody.EvaluateSchema(collector))
                {
                    ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(201, SchemaValidationDetail.FormatResults(collector));
                }
            }
            else
            {
                using JsonSchemaResultsCollector collector = JsonSchemaResultsCollector.Create(JsonSchemaResultsLevel.Detailed);
                if (!this.DefaultBody.EvaluateSchema(collector))
                {
                    ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(this.StatusCode, SchemaValidationDetail.FormatResults(collector));
                }
            }
        }
        else
        {
            if (this.StatusCode == 201)
            {
                if (!this.CreatedBody.EvaluateSchema())
                {
                    ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(201);
                }
            }
            else
            {
                if (!this.DefaultBody.EvaluateSchema())
                {
                    ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(this.StatusCode);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        this.parsedDocument?.Dispose();
        if (this.owner is not null)
        {
            await this.owner.DisposeAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);
        }
    }

/// <summary>
/// Request type for the DeletePet operation.
/// </summary>
/// <remarks>Delete a specific pet</remarks>
public readonly struct DeletePetRequest : IApiRequest<DeletePetRequest>
{

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the petId parameter.
    /// </summary>
    public JsonElement PetId { get; init; }

    /// <summary>
    /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="DeletePetRequest"/> struct.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="petId">The petId parameter.</param>
    public DeletePetRequest(JsonElement petId)
    {
        this.PetId = petId;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static ReadOnlySpan<byte> PathTemplateUtf8 => "/pets/{petId}"u8;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static OperationMethod Method => OperationMethod.Delete;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasPathParameters => true;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasQueryParameters => false;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasHeaderParameters => true;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasCookieParameters => false;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void WriteResolvedPath(IBufferWriter<byte> writer)
    {
        writer.Write("/pets/"u8);
        using UnescapedUtf8JsonString utf8PetId = ((JsonElement)this.PetId).GetUtf8String();
        Span<byte> escPetId = writer.GetSpan(utf8PetId.Span.Length * 3);
        if (Utf8Uri.TryEscapeDataString(utf8PetId.Span, escPetId, out int ewPetId))
        {
            writer.Advance(ewPetId);
        }
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public int WriteQueryString(IBufferWriter<byte> writer)
    {
        ThrowHelper.ThrowNoQueryParameters();
        return default;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void WriteHeaders<TState>(HeaderCallback<TState> callback, TState state)
    {
        callback("Accept"u8, "application/json"u8, state);

    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public int WriteCookies(IBufferWriter<byte> writer)
    {
        ThrowHelper.ThrowNoCookieParameters();
        return default;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void Validate(ValidationMode mode = ValidationMode.Basic)
    {
        if (mode == ValidationMode.None)
        {
            return;
        }
        else if (mode == ValidationMode.Detailed)
        {
            using JsonSchemaResultsCollector collectorPetId = JsonSchemaResultsCollector.Create(JsonSchemaResultsLevel.Detailed);
            if (!this.PetId.EvaluateSchema(collectorPetId))
            {
                ThrowHelper.ThrowRequestParameterValidationFailed("petId", SchemaValidationDetail.FormatResults(collectorPetId));
            }

        }
        else
        {
            if (!this.PetId.EvaluateSchema())
            {
                ThrowHelper.ThrowRequestParameterValidationFailed("petId");
            }

        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Creates a <see cref="Uri"/> for the default server.
    /// </summary>
    /// <returns>A <see cref="Uri"/> for the server.</returns>
    public static Uri CreateServerUri() => new("https://petstore.example.com/v1");

/// <summary>
/// Response type for the DeletePet operation.
/// </summary>
public struct DeletePetResponse : IApiResponse<DeletePetResponse>
{
    private IAsyncDisposable? owner;
    private IDisposable? parsedDocument;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public int StatusCode { get; private set; }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public bool IsSuccess => this.StatusCode >= 200 && this.StatusCode < 300;

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the default response body.
    /// </summary>
    public JsonElement DefaultBody { get; private set; }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static async ValueTask<DeletePetResponse> CreateAsync(
        int statusCode,
        Stream contentStream,
        string? contentType = null,
        IResponseHeaders? responseHeaders = null,
        IAsyncDisposable? owner = null,
        IApiTransport? transport = null,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        DeletePetResponse response = default;
        response.StatusCode = statusCode;
        response.owner = owner;

        if (statusCode == 204)
        {

            return response;
        }

        var defaultDoc = await ParsedJsonDocument<JsonElement>.ParseAsync(contentStream, default, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);
        response.parsedDocument = defaultDoc;
        response.DefaultBody = defaultDoc.RootElement;
        return response;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Tries to get the default typed response body.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="result">The typed response body if the status matches.</param>
    /// <returns><see langword="true"/> if the status code does not match any specific response.</returns>
    public bool TryGetDefault(out JsonElement result)
    {
        result = this.DefaultBody;
        return true;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Matches the response against each status code and content type,
    /// and calls the corresponding handler.
    /// </summary>
    /// <typeparam name="TResult">The type of the result returned by the handler.</typeparam>
    /// <param name="matchDefault">Handler for a default response.</param>
    /// <returns>The result of calling the matched handler.</returns>
    public TResult MatchResult<TResult>(
        ResponseMatcher<JsonElement, TResult> matchDefault)
    {
        return matchDefault(this.DefaultBody);
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Matches the response against each status code and content type,
    /// and calls the corresponding handler.
    /// </summary>
    /// <typeparam name="TContext">The type of the context to pass to the handler.</typeparam>
    /// <typeparam name="TResult">The type of the result returned by the handler.</typeparam>
    /// <param name="context">The context to pass to the handler.</param>
    /// <param name="matchDefault">Handler for a default response.</param>
    /// <returns>The result of calling the matched handler.</returns>
    public TResult MatchResult<TContext, TResult>(
        in TContext context,
        ResponseMatcher<JsonElement, TContext, TResult> matchDefault)
    where TContext : allows ref struct
    {
        return matchDefault(this.DefaultBody, context);
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void Validate(ValidationMode mode = ValidationMode.Basic)
    {
        if (mode == ValidationMode.None)
        {
            return;
        }
        else if (mode == ValidationMode.Detailed)
        {
            using JsonSchemaResultsCollector collector = JsonSchemaResultsCollector.Create(JsonSchemaResultsLevel.Detailed);
            if (!this.DefaultBody.EvaluateSchema(collector))
            {
                ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(this.StatusCode, SchemaValidationDetail.FormatResults(collector));
            }
        }
        else
        {
            if (!this.DefaultBody.EvaluateSchema())
            {
                ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(this.StatusCode);
            }
        }
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        this.parsedDocument?.Dispose();
        if (this.owner is not null)
        {
            await this.owner.DisposeAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);
        }
    }
}

// This code was generated by the Corvus.Text.Json OpenAPI code generator.

namespace Petstore.Client;

/// <summary>
/// Client interface for the ApiPets API operations.
/// </summary>
public interface IApiPetsClient : IAsyncDisposable
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Creates a <see cref="Uri"/> for the default server.
    /// </summary>
    /// <returns>A <see cref="Uri"/> for the server.</returns>
    public static Uri CreateServerUri() => new("https://petstore.example.com/v1");

    /// <summary>
    /// List all pets
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="limit">The limit parameter. Default: 100.</param>
    /// <param name="cancellationToken">A cancellation token.</param>
    ValueTask<ListPetsResponse> ListPetsAsync(Petstore.Client.JsonInt32.Source limit = default, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default, ValidationMode validationMode = ValidationMode.Basic, ValidationMode responseValidationMode = ValidationMode.None);

    /// <summary>
    /// Create a pet
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="body">The request body..</param>
    /// <param name="cancellationToken">A cancellation token.</param>
    ValueTask<CreatePetResponse> CreatePetAsync(Petstore.Client.NewPet.Source body, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default, ValidationMode validationMode = ValidationMode.Basic, ValidationMode responseValidationMode = ValidationMode.None);

    /// <summary>
    /// Info for a specific pet
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="petId">The petId parameter.</param>
    /// <param name="cancellationToken">A cancellation token.</param>
    ValueTask<ShowPetByIdResponse> ShowPetByIdAsync(Petstore.Client.JsonString.Source petId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default, ValidationMode validationMode = ValidationMode.Basic, ValidationMode responseValidationMode = ValidationMode.None);

    /// <summary>
    /// Update a pet via form submission
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="petId">The petId parameter.</param>
    /// <param name="body">The request body..</param>
    /// <param name="cancellationToken">A cancellation token.</param>
    ValueTask<UpdatePetResponse> UpdatePetAsync(Petstore.Client.JsonString.Source petId, Petstore.Client.NewPet.Source body, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default, ValidationMode validationMode = ValidationMode.Basic, ValidationMode responseValidationMode = ValidationMode.None);

    /// <summary>
    /// Delete a specific pet
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="petId">The petId parameter.</param>
    /// <param name="cancellationToken">A cancellation token.</param>

    /// <summary>
    /// Upload a pet photo with metadata
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="petId">The petId parameter.</param>
    /// <param name="body">The request body..</param>
    /// <param name="cancellationToken">A cancellation token.</param>

// <auto-generated>
// This code was generated by the Corvus.Text.Json OpenAPI code generator.

#nullable enable

using System.Buffers;
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;
using Corvus.Runtime.InteropServices;
using Corvus.Text.Json;
using Corvus.Text.Json.Internal;
using Corvus.Text.Json.OpenApi;

namespace Petstore.Client;

/// <summary>
/// Request type for the ListPets operation.
/// </summary>
/// <remarks>List all pets</remarks>
public readonly struct ListPetsRequest : IApiRequest<ListPetsRequest>
{

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the limit parameter.
    /// </summary>
    public Petstore.Client.JsonInt32 Limit { get; init; }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static ReadOnlySpan<byte> PathTemplateUtf8 => "/pets"u8;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static OperationMethod Method => OperationMethod.Get;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasPathParameters => false;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasQueryParameters => true;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasHeaderParameters => true;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasCookieParameters => false;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void WriteResolvedPath(IBufferWriter<byte> writer)
    {
        ThrowHelper.ThrowNoPathParameters();
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public int WriteQueryString(IBufferWriter<byte> writer)
    {
        int totalWritten = 0;
        bool first = true;

        if (this.Limit.IsNotUndefined())
        {
            if (!first)
            {
                writer.Write("&"u8);
                totalWritten++;
            }

            writer.Write("limit="u8);
            totalWritten += 6;
            Span<byte> bufLimit = writer.GetSpan(11);
            this.Limit.TryFormat(bufLimit, out int bwLimit, default, default);
            writer.Advance(bwLimit);
            totalWritten += bwLimit;

            first = false;
        }

        return totalWritten;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void WriteHeaders<TState>(HeaderCallback<TState> callback, TState state)
    {
        callback("Accept"u8, "application/json"u8, state);

    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public int WriteCookies(IBufferWriter<byte> writer)
    {
        ThrowHelper.ThrowNoCookieParameters();
        return default;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void Validate(ValidationMode mode = ValidationMode.Basic)
    {
        if (mode == ValidationMode.None)
        {
            return;
        }
        else if (mode == ValidationMode.Detailed)
        {
            if (this.Limit.IsNotUndefined())
            {
                using JsonSchemaResultsCollector collectorLimit = JsonSchemaResultsCollector.Create(JsonSchemaResultsLevel.Detailed);
                if (!this.Limit.EvaluateSchema(collectorLimit))
                {
                    ThrowHelper.ThrowRequestParameterValidationFailed("limit", SchemaValidationDetail.FormatResults(collectorLimit));
                }
            }

        }
        else
        {
            if (this.Limit.IsNotUndefined() && !this.Limit.EvaluateSchema())
            {
                ThrowHelper.ThrowRequestParameterValidationFailed("limit");
            }

        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Creates a <see cref="Uri"/> for the default server.
    /// </summary>
    /// <returns>A <see cref="Uri"/> for the server.</returns>
    public static Uri CreateServerUri() => new("https://petstore.example.com/v1");

}

/// <summary>
/// Response type for the ListPets operation.
/// </summary>
public struct ListPetsResponse : IApiResponse<ListPetsResponse>
{
    private IAsyncDisposable? owner;
    private IDisposable? parsedDocument;
    private IResponseHeaders? responseHeaders;
    private JsonWorkspace workspace;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public int StatusCode { get; private set; }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public bool IsSuccess => this.StatusCode >= 200 && this.StatusCode < 300;

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the 200 response body.
    /// </summary>
    public Petstore.Client.Pets OkBody { get; private set; }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the default response body.
    /// </summary>
    public Petstore.Client.Error DefaultBody { get; private set; }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the value of the <c>x-next</c> response header,
    /// or <see langword="null"/> if the header was not present.
    /// </summary>
    private Petstore.Client.JsonString xNextHeaderValue;
    private bool xNextHeaderParsed;

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the parsed value of the <c>x-next</c> response header,
    /// or <see langword="default"/> (undefined) if not present.
    /// Use <c>IsUndefined()</c> to check for absence.
    /// </summary>
    public Petstore.Client.JsonString XNextHeader
    {
        get
        {
            if (this.xNextHeaderParsed)
            {
                return this.xNextHeaderValue;
            }

            this.xNextHeaderParsed = true;

            if (this.responseHeaders is not null
                && this.responseHeaders.TryGetValue("x-next", out string? rawValue)
                && rawValue is not null)
            {
                this.xNextHeaderValue = Corvus.Text.Json.OpenApi.HeaderValueParser.ParseString<Petstore.Client.JsonString>(rawValue, this.workspace);
            }

            return this.xNextHeaderValue;
        }
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static async ValueTask<ListPetsResponse> CreateAsync(
        int statusCode,
        Stream contentStream,
        string? contentType = null,
        IResponseHeaders? responseHeaders = null,
        IAsyncDisposable? owner = null,
        IApiTransport? transport = null,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
    {
        ListPetsResponse response = default;
        response.StatusCode = statusCode;
        response.owner = owner;

        response.responseHeaders = responseHeaders;
        response.workspace = JsonWorkspace.CreateUnrented();

        if (statusCode == 200)
        {
            var okDoc = await ParsedJsonDocument<Petstore.Client.Pets>.ParseAsync(contentStream, default, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);
            response.parsedDocument = okDoc;
            response.OkBody = okDoc.RootElement;
            return response;
        }

        var defaultDoc = await ParsedJsonDocument<Petstore.Client.Error>.ParseAsync(contentStream, default, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);
        response.parsedDocument = defaultDoc;
        response.DefaultBody = defaultDoc.RootElement;
        return response;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Tries to get the 200 typed response body.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="result">The typed response body if the status matches.</param>
    /// <returns><see langword="true"/> if the status code is 200.</returns>
    public bool TryGetOk(out Petstore.Client.Pets result)
    {
        if (this.StatusCode == 200)
        {
            result = this.OkBody;
            return true;
        }

        result = default;
        return false;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Tries to get the default typed response body.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="result">The typed response body if the status matches.</param>
    /// <returns><see langword="true"/> if the status code does not match any specific response.</returns>
    public bool TryGetDefault(out Petstore.Client.Error result)
    {
        if (this.StatusCode != 200)
        {
            result = this.DefaultBody;
            return true;
        }

        result = default;
        return false;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Matches the response against each status code and content type,
    /// and calls the corresponding handler.
    /// </summary>
    /// <typeparam name="TResult">The type of the result returned by the handler.</typeparam>
    /// <param name="matchOk">Handler for the 200 response.</param>
    /// <param name="matchDefault">Handler for a default response.</param>
    /// <returns>The result of calling the matched handler.</returns>
    public TResult MatchResult<TResult>(
        ResponseMatcher<Petstore.Client.Pets, TResult> matchOk,
        ResponseMatcher<Petstore.Client.Error, TResult> matchDefault)
    {
        if (this.StatusCode == 200)
        {
            return matchOk(this.OkBody);
        }

        return matchDefault(this.DefaultBody);
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Matches the response against each status code and content type,
    /// and calls the corresponding handler.
    /// </summary>
    /// <typeparam name="TContext">The type of the context to pass to the handler.</typeparam>
    /// <typeparam name="TResult">The type of the result returned by the handler.</typeparam>
    /// <param name="context">The context to pass to the handler.</param>
    /// <param name="matchOk">Handler for the 200 response.</param>
    /// <param name="matchDefault">Handler for a default response.</param>

        in TContext context,

        ResponseMatcher<Petstore.Client.Error, TContext, TResult> matchDefault)

    public void Validate(ValidationMode mode = ValidationMode.Basic)
    {
        if (mode == ValidationMode.None)

            return;
        }
        else if (mode == ValidationMode.Detailed)

                    ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(200);

                {
                    ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(this.StatusCode);
                }
            }

    {

        this.parsedDocument?.Dispose();

        else
        {
            if (!this.PetId.EvaluateSchema())
            {
                ThrowHelper.ThrowRequestParameterValidationFailed("petId");
            }

        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Creates a <see cref="Uri"/> for the default server.
    /// </summary>
    /// <returns>A <see cref="Uri"/> for the server.</returns>
    public static Uri CreateServerUri() => new("https://petstore.example.com/v1");

}

        {

        }

        return matchDefault(this.DefaultBody, context);
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void Validate(ValidationMode mode = ValidationMode.Basic)
    {
        if (mode == ValidationMode.None)
        {
            return;
        }
        else if (mode == ValidationMode.Detailed)
        {
            if (this.StatusCode == 200)
            {
                using JsonSchemaResultsCollector collector = JsonSchemaResultsCollector.Create(JsonSchemaResultsLevel.Detailed);
                if (!this.OkBody.EvaluateSchema(collector))
                {
                    ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(200, SchemaValidationDetail.FormatResults(collector));
                }
            }
            else
            {
                using JsonSchemaResultsCollector collector = JsonSchemaResultsCollector.Create(JsonSchemaResultsLevel.Detailed);
                if (!this.DefaultBody.EvaluateSchema(collector))
                {
                    ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(this.StatusCode, SchemaValidationDetail.FormatResults(collector));
                }
            }
        }
        else
        {
            if (this.StatusCode == 200)
            {
                if (!this.OkBody.EvaluateSchema())
                {
                    ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(200);
                }
            }
            else
            {
                if (!this.DefaultBody.EvaluateSchema())
                {
                    ThrowHelper.ThrowResponseBodyValidationFailed(this.StatusCode);
                }
            }
        }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        this.parsedDocument?.Dispose();
        if (this.owner is not null)
        {
            await this.owner.DisposeAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);
        }

namespace Petstore.Client;

/// <summary>
/// Request type for the UploadPetPhoto operation.
/// </summary>
/// <remarks>Upload a pet photo with metadata</remarks>
public readonly struct UploadPetPhotoRequest : IApiRequest<UploadPetPhotoRequest>
{

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the petId parameter.
    /// </summary>
    public Petstore.Client.JsonString PetId { get; init; }

    /// <summary>
    /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="UploadPetPhotoRequest"/> struct.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="petId">The petId parameter.</param>
    public UploadPetPhotoRequest(Petstore.Client.JsonString petId)
    {
        this.PetId = petId;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static ReadOnlySpan<byte> PathTemplateUtf8 => "/pets/{petId}/photo"u8;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static OperationMethod Method => OperationMethod.Post;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasPathParameters => true;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasQueryParameters => false;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasHeaderParameters => true;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public static bool HasCookieParameters => false;

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void WriteResolvedPath(IBufferWriter<byte> writer)
    {
        writer.Write("/pets/"u8);
        using UnescapedUtf8JsonString utf8PetId = ((JsonElement)this.PetId).GetUtf8String();
        Span<byte> escPetId = writer.GetSpan(utf8PetId.Span.Length * 3);
        if (Utf8Uri.TryEscapeDataString(utf8PetId.Span, escPetId, out int ewPetId))
        {
            writer.Advance(ewPetId);
        }
        writer.Write("/photo"u8);
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public int WriteQueryString(IBufferWriter<byte> writer)
    {
        ThrowHelper.ThrowNoQueryParameters();
        return default;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void WriteHeaders<TState>(HeaderCallback<TState> callback, TState state)
    {
        callback("Accept"u8, "application/json"u8, state);

    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public int WriteCookies(IBufferWriter<byte> writer)
    {
        ThrowHelper.ThrowNoCookieParameters();
        return default;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc/>
    public void Validate(ValidationMode mode = ValidationMode.Basic)
    {
        if (mode == ValidationMode.None)
        {
            return;
        }
        else if (mode == ValidationMode.Detailed)
        {
            using JsonSchemaResultsCollector collectorPetId = JsonSchemaResultsCollector.Create(JsonSchemaResultsLevel.Detailed);
            if (!this.PetId.EvaluateSchema(collectorPetId))
            {
                ThrowHelper.ThrowRequestParameterValidationFailed("petId", SchemaValidationDetail.FormatResults(collectorPetId));
            }

        }
        else
        {
            if (!this.PetId.EvaluateSchema())
            {
                ThrowHelper.ThrowRequestParameterValidationFailed("petId");
            }

        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Creates a <see cref="Uri"/> for the default server.
    /// </summary>
    /// <returns>A <see cref="Uri"/> for the server.</returns>
    public static Uri CreateServerUri() => new("https://petstore.example.com/v1");
